package rulecoverage

import (
	"context"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for background_goroutine_started_inside_transaction_scope.
// Rule intent: Goroutines launched while relying on open transaction state.
type BackgroundGoroutineTxModel struct {
	ID     string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
}

func PositiveBackgroundGoroutineStartedInsideTransactionScope(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB, input string) error {
	tx := db.Begin()
	tx.Create(&BackgroundGoroutineTxModel{ID: input, Status: "created"})

	go func() {
		tx.Model(&BackgroundGoroutineTxModel{}).Where("id = ?", input).Update("status", "processed")
		log.Println("background update completed")
	}()

	tx.Commit()
	return nil
}
